description: Explicit UI contract for the public marketing /ecosystem route.

page_hero.subtitle: Five layers of independent operators — registry, providers, hosting, identity and integrators — held together only by open standards and stable identifiers.

tier_empty_items.comment: The header (eyebrow + hairline) still renders; the items grid renders empty.

non_negotiables: Tier order is fixed in v0.4: Sovereign Operators → Model Providers → Hosting & Identity → Integration Partners.
Each tier block wraps in Reveal with delay = i * 60 ms.
Hero crumb uses Unicode middle dot U+00B7: 'Ecosystem · Partners & Operators'.
Hero gradient span text is exactly 'not a platform' (no terminating space; the period is outside the span).
Hero subtitle uses an em dash (U+2014): 'Five layers of independent operators — registry, providers, hosting, identity and integrators — held together only by open standards and stable identifiers.'
Decorative square is 28×28, borderRadius 6, background var(--grad-accent), opacity 0.8 — must be marked aria-hidden.
Card label fontSize is 13.5 (not 13 or 14) and fontWeight 500.
v0.4 cards are non-interactive — do NOT bind onClick until per-partner detail pages ship.
Item names are reproduced verbatim including Unicode middle dots (e.g. 'Meta · Llama').
